name: 720p Nuendo
desc: Preset for fast work in Nuendo
cmd: ffmpeg -y -hwaccel videotoolbox -i {input} -c:v h264_videotoolbox -b:v 5000k -maxrate 8000k -pix_fmt yuv420p -profile:v main -g 1 -bufsize 10M -s 720x1280 -aspect 16:9 -level 3.1 -c:a aac -b:a 192k -ar 48000 -movflags +faststart -sn -color_range tv -color_primaries bt709 -color_trc bt709 -colorspace bt709 {output}.mov
